name: agora
description: Language flashcards in Claude Code's thinking spinner. Modifies Claude Code's installed extension files on disk (reversible) to show your vocabulary while Claude generates. Free, no ads, no account.

commands.title: Agora: Enable (patch Claude Code thinking verbs)
Agora: Disable (restore Claude Code thinking verbs)

agora.deck.description: Which language deck to show in the Claude Code thinking spinner.
